name: Marbled Pumpkin Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------------CHEESECAKE---------------------------------
3 (8 oz.) packages Cream Cheese, softened
1 cup Granulated sugar
1/4 cup Light brown sugar, packed
1 3/4 cups Pumpkin puree (from a 16 oz. can)
4 large Eggs
1/2 cup Evaporated Milk, undiluted
1/4 teaspoon Cornstarch
3/4 teaspoon Cinnamon
1/8 teaspoon Nutmeg
FOR CRUST: In a medium bowl, combine Graham Cracker crumbs, sugar and butter. Press onto the bottom of a greased 10-inch springform pan. Sprinkle with 1 cup chocolate morsels.
FOR CHEESECAKE: In a small, heavy saucepan over low heat, melt remaining morsels, stirring constantly until smooth. In a large mixing bowl, beat Cream Cheese, Granulated sugar and Light brown sugar. Add Pumpkin puree. Beat in Eggs and Evaporated Milk. Stir in Cornstarch, Cinnamon and Nutmeg. Remove 1 cup pumpkin batter; stir into melted chocolate. Pour remaining pumpkin batter into the springform pan. Pour chocolate mixture over top; swirl. Bake in a preheated 325 degree oven for 60 minutes, or until edge of filling is set. Turn off the heat; allow cheesecake to stand in oven for 30 minutes. Remove from oven; cool completely. Cover and chill for several hours.
